title: Preparation of JF dye for retro-orbital injection in mice
author: Boaz Mohar

steps.title: Take an aliqote with 100 nmol...
steps.instruction: Take an aliqote with 100 nmol of dye from -20 °C storage.

steps.title: Add 20 µL DMSO and do...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL DMSO and do ~10 up and down with the pipeter Dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D2650

steps.title: Add 20ul Pluronic F-127 20% in...
steps.instruction: Add 20ul Pluronic F-127 20% in DMSO ~10 up and down with the pipeter Pluronic™ F-127 (20% Solution in DMSO) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P3000MP

steps.title: Add 60ul 1x PBS ~10 up...
steps.instruction: Add 60ul 1x PBS ~10 up and down with the pipeter PBS Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher

steps.title: Drew up to 100ul without bubbles...
steps.instruction: Drew up to 100ul without bubbles to a 29G syringe 29G x 12.7mm 0.3ml syringe Ulticare Catalog #09230

steps.title: Follow the Retro-orbital injection protocol Retro-orbital...
steps.instruction: Follow the Retro-orbital injection protocol Retro-orbital injection of virus or dye in mice by Boaz Mohar
